DEFENDANT JOHN PANG M.D. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALIGH SURGICAL ASSOCIATES, INC. IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS MEGAN ALVAREZ. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED.
